case_title: E. VICTOR GABRIEL INC. VS COULTURE DESIGNER EUROPEAN CLOTHING INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COULTURE DESIGNER EUROPEAN CLOTHING INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF E. VICTOR GABRIEL INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COULTURE DESIGNER EUROPEAN CLOTHING INC. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26622 ON 9-5-01. PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT $83 COURT COSTS. DEFENDANT TO RETURN 6 PAIRS LEATHER PANTS, 2 LEATHER JACKETS & 2 CLOTH SUITS TO PLAINTIFF FORTHWITH. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COPY OF CORRESPONDANCE FROM COUTURE TO E. VICTOR GABRIEL, INC. RECEIVED FILED.
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED JULY 11,2001 10:00 AM. $10:00 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-20-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-11-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY E. VICTOR GABRIEL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COULTURE DESIGNER EUROPEAN CLOTHING INC. YAHID, DAVID F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-11-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-02-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF WILL NOT BE IN THE USA ON THE DATE OF JULY 11TH.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF E. VICTOR GABRIEL INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COULTURE DESIGNER EUROPEAN CLOTHING INC. YAHID, DAVID F. $2,389.24 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,439.24, DEFENDANT DAVID F. YAHID IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
